metadata.description: Agent skills for CFO tasks — pricing, expense tracking, invoicing & billing, forecasting, and reporting — built to run against Economico's MCP ledger

plugins.name: setup-economico
plugins.description: Connect and authenticate Economico (the agent-native ledger the other cfo-skills run against) via MCP or the @economico/cli, including unattended confidential clients

plugins.name: financial-analyst
plugins.description: Read Economico's ledger and turn it into financial analysis — reports plus ratios, trends, aging, concentration, burn, and runway, drilling into the journal when the reports don't say enough. Read-only.

plugins.name: expense-tracking
plugins.description: Ramp-style accounts payable: find vendor receipts/invoices in connected email and record them as bills, first building each vendor's party → contract → obligation spine so every line maps to the right chart-of-accounts code and feeds unit economics.
